name: Lamb'n' Pine Nut Stir Fry ( MW )
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Bok Choy, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze the lamb and thinly slice it into bite-size strips.
2. In a 1-cup measuring cup, stir together water, oyster sauce, cornstarch, grated gingerroot, and chicken bouillon granules. Microwave uncovered on 100% power for 1½ minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring every 30 seconds. Set aside.
3. In a small nonmetal bowl, combine bok choy, sliced mushrooms, and 1 tbsp water. Cover with vented clear plastic wrap. Microwave covered on 100% power for 1½ minutes or until bok choy is just crisp-tender. Drain.
4. Preheat a 6-1/2-inch microwave browning dish on 100% power for 3 minutes.
5. Add cooking oil to the browning dish and swirl to coat. Add lamb strips and microwave covered on 100% power for 1 to 2 minutes or until done. Drain off any fat.
6. Stir in the oyster sauce mixture and microwave uncovered on 100% power about 30 seconds or until heated through.
7. Toss the lamb mixture with toasted pine nuts and bok choy mixture. Serve over hot cooked rice, if desired.
